name: Dwarven Ale
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance (additive) based on Blacksmiths owned.
formula: +(2 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Blacksmiths owned

name: Expert Masonry
effect: Reduce all building cost multipliers by 0.01 (becomes 1.14).

name: Mining Prodigies
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Excavations made (including resets) this Reincarnation.
formula: (40 * (x * (1 + 2 * y)) ^ 0.4)%, where x is excavations, y is resets this Reincarnation

name: Underground Citadels
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Gems owned.
formula: (1.5 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.5)%, where x is Gems owned

name: Indestructible Treasure
effect: Increase clicking reward based on buildings owned.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.65)%, where x is buildings owned

name: Bearded Assistants
effect: Increase production of assistants based on time this Era (beard grows!).
formula: (x ^ 0.7)%, where x is time this Era

name: Battlehammers
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Dwarven Coins found this Era.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Dwarven Coins found this Era

name: Overwatch
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: +(50 + 35 * x ^ 0.7), where x is longest spell duration

name: Solidity
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on highest High Bastions this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is highest High Bastions this Reincarnation

name: Stonetalking
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on higher of Maximum Mana or Mana Regeneration.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + max(x, y)) ^ 2)%, where x is Max Mana, y is Mana Regen

name: Refined Minerals
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regen and Max Mana based on highest time as Order, Balance, or Chaos.
formula: (0.03 * max(x, y, z) ^ 0.7)%, where x/y/z are Order/Balance/Chaos time this Reincarnation
